answers: Hackathon = time-limited (24-48 hour) event where teams build projects. Great for networking, learning, and building portfolio.
Tips: plan before coding (spend first hour on idea + design), build MVP only, prepare a great demo, and get sleep!
Winning tips: solve a real problem, have working demo (not slides), show technical depth, and present with energy.
Preparation: learn a quick prototyping stack, practice pitching, bring snacks, and form a team with diverse skills.
